description: Private accounts. Dating: 11th–13th century. Some entries deal with the weights of items. The term "וזן" appears repeatedly under the archival tape that was applied along the right border of the recto. Mentions people such as Ibn ʿAṭiyya, al-Sharīf, and Ibn Ghazāl. Requires further examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
